title: NotificationPayload
description: The top-level notification payload sent to the Bugsnag Error Reporting API. Contains the API key, notifier information, and one or more error events.

apiKey.description: The Bugsnag API key for the project. Found in project settings on the Bugsnag dashboard.

payloadVersion.description: The version of the payload format. Current version is 4.

events.description: The list of error events to report. Each event represents an individual error occurrence.
